title: CLIFFHANGER — Ginger eyes the next stash spot
prompt: Close-up in @backyard-kitchen, slow push-in. @Ginger sits in the foreground center-frame, head tilted, eyes locked just past the camera with a sly mischievous look. The black metal fence is visible behind her. Ginger lifts one paw and sniffs it slyly. Ginger: "Hrf!" Slight zoom-in, mischievous music sting, a long shadow falls across the petunias behind.
